name: BRAVO
tagline: Automated manual test cycles at scale from weeks to hours

starry.situation: A global endpoint and security management vendor struggled with slow, manual QA cycles. Regression testing across multiple OS and application versions delayed releases and consumed significant engineering effort.
starry.task: Design an analytics-driven testing platform to automate result collection, triage, and feedback loops — reducing cycle time while improving reliability.
starry.action: Architected BRAVO, a data analytics framework to aggregate test telemetry and automatically classify failures. Integrated with CI/CD to trigger targeted re-runs and prioritize fixes based on impact. Built dashboards for engineering and QA to visualize coverage, flakiness, and pass/fail trends.
starry.result: Cut test cycles from days to hours. Improved release predictability and reduced failed deployments.
starry.return: Estimated savings of $1.8M annually from reduced effort and faster release velocity.
starry.yield: Accelerated delivery without sacrificing quality, demonstrating measurable value of DevOps and analytics in enterprise software pipelines.
